name: Risk Heatmap Sync
desc: Builds a risk heatmap snapshot for affected agents after a change event.

name: BOM Diff Broadcast
desc: Broadcasts BOM delta details to downstream agents that subscribe to version changes.

name: Constraint Repair Suggestion
desc: Suggests a repair path when design and supply constraints conflict.

name: Propagation Trace Export
desc: Exports the current propagation trace for replay, audit, and simulation review.
